---
title: "Marathon Data"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default]
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(mice)
library(broom)

source("code/prep.R")
source("code/missingdat.R")
```


## Research Question

How strongly does VO2 max predict marathon finish time, and does this relationship persist after accounting for other health-related factors?

![](images/forrest.jpg){width="66%"}

## Data Set

-   Source

-   Synthetic designed for ML

-   80,000 Observations

-   40 Predictors

## Missing Data

```{r}
missing_prop_long
```
